diagnose.continuity_detail: 用户独立完成wanxia XHS管线——2 commits确认收尾。pachong-master/moni pending项是增强非修复。无打断、无紧急阻塞。
diagnose.quality_detail: 所有核心项目GATES.md存在。pachong-master测试38/42通过。wanxia E2E验证通过(80城→12帖)。无测试失败。
diagnose.opportunity_detail: 两领域新研究产出(social media automation + AlgoXpert framework)。已有建议队列5项仍有效。wanxia完成释放了XHS管线——用户完成而非引擎。
diagnose.risk_detail: 无安全漏洞。无数据丢失风险(wanxia WAL已正常运作)。git状态clean。cebpubservice 502为单源阻塞——CCGP双源稳定日产~1000条。
diagnose.primary_diagnosis: 部署后稳态。用户独立完成wanxia XHS管线收尾——引擎正确选择静默瞭望。工作区健康、无新风险、无紧急项。

queries: social media auto-publishing automation content pipeline best practices 2026
Monte Carlo walk-forward optimization quant backtesting 2026 new methodology anti-overfitting
key_findings: Social media 2026: AI agent pipelines (not just schedulers) are standard. Claude+n8n, Simular Sai, IFTTT stacks. Content recycling for evergreen. OAuth token weekly health checks. Malformed JSON retry logic. Platform-specific adaptation norms (LinkedIn 1200-1800 chars, X <280, TikTok 80-120 hook-driven). Optimal times: Instagram Tue-Thu 9-11AM, TikTok Tue-Thu 8-10AM. Batch creation 45-60min/weekly → 75% time savings. Directly applicable to wanxia XHS pipeline.

AlgoXpert Alpha Research Framework (arXiv:2603.09219, Pham et al. Mar 2026): Three-stage defense-in-depth — IS (stable parameter regions) → WFA (rolling windows + purge gaps + majority pass + catastrophic veto) → OOS (strict lock). Additional: cliff veto, spread/leverage guards, circuit breakers, kill switch. Complements GT-Score + Island Volume Selection. Directly applicable to moni WFO hardening.
GT-Score (previously indexed, confirmed): 98% generalization improvement, 56% higher Monte Carlo, embeds anti-overfitting into optimization objective.
research.note: 2 queries across 2 domains. Social media automation is a NEW domain not in prior 9 L3 research cycles. AlgoXpert (Mar 2026) is genuinely new — previously only GT-Score (Jan 2026) was indexed. Both have direct project applicability.

deliberate.q1_detail: 用户明确选择亲自动手完成wanxia XHS管线——2个手动提交确认收尾。引擎正确识别并静默瞭望。当前L3心跳是标准激活——引擎应执行基础设施维护(归档+校准+研究记录)。
deliberate.q2_detail: 24h内无坏事会发生。wanxia管线已部署(cron调度+素材包)。pachong-master CCGP双源稳定。moni WFO是增强非修复。所有已知pending项非紧急。
deliberate.q3_detail: 本周期仅写案例文件+更新校准+归档案例——全可逆操作。
deliberate.q4_detail: 模式accuracy均为1.0(小样本n=1-2)。scout:infrastructure:scan:no_delta(1/1), l3:infrastructure:archive:batch_case_sync(1/1), cold_start_exhaustion(2/2)。无负面反馈历史。
deliberate.q5_detail: 仅文件写入——git可完全回滚。
key_considerations: 用户独立完成wanxia管线——引擎正确行为是记录+归档+静默，不制造噪音

部署后稳态——不需要引擎发起新建议或行动
deliberate.downgrade_reason: 用户活跃开发后部署稳态——引擎正确行为是OBSERVE+基础设施维护，不发起项目级行动。虽然个案归档+校准更新是基础设施维护(可逆，可达ACT_SILENT)，但整体态势要求保守——OBSERVE是恰当级别。

confidence_breakdown.pattern_match_detail: l3:infrastructure:archive:batch_case_sync (accuracy 1.0, base 10), scout:infrastructure:scan:no_delta (1.0, base 8), scout:user_active_development:stand_down (新发现于case-011, accuracy N/A——首次应用) — 3模式匹配指向基础设施维护
confidence_breakdown.web_corroboration_detail: 2/2 queries produced genuinely new findings. Social media automation domain首次进入引擎研究视野。AlgoXpert Mar 2026 not in prior cycles.
confidence_breakdown.risk_assessment_detail: 仅文件写入——案例文件+校准更新+归档。零项目代码风险。
confidence_breakdown.user_preference_alignment_detail: checkpoint_protected autonomy授权引擎维护基础设施。但用户刚独立完成大量工作——此时发起新建议可能被视为抢功/噪音。保守=尊重用户主导权。

decide.action_level_justification: 用户完成wanxia XHS管线后处于部署稳态。引擎唯一合法行动：3案例归档+校准更新+研究记录+案例文件写入(11th activation)。不更新suggestions(已有队列仍有效且用户刚完成工作)。不发起项目级操作。保守是对用户主导权的尊重。
decide.decision_summary: L3第11轮：用户独立完成wanxia XHS发布管线(2 commits)。工作区部署后稳态。3案例归档+校准更新+2领域新研究(social media automation + AlgoXpert)。引擎OBSERVE静默——维护基础设施完整性，不发起项目行动。

execute.research_novelty_note: Social media automation is a NEW domain for engine research — first coverage in 11 L3 cycles. AlgoXpert (Mar 2026) is genuinely new — complements but distinct from GT-Score (Jan 2026). Both have direct project applicability.

跨领域WebSearch高效——social media automation(新领域)和AlgoXpert(新论文)均在首次查询中命中

retrospect.new_pattern_discovered: scout:post_deployment_steady_state: When user completes a feature deployment (commits pushed), engine should recognize the 'deployment steady state' — maintain infrastructure (archive + calibrate + research) at OBSERVE level, do not initiate new project-level actions, do not update suggestions unless genuinely new issues emerge.
lessons_learned: 用户独立完成功能部署后→引擎应识别'部署后稳态'：归档+校准+研究→OBSERVE，不发起新行动
研究在用户完成任务后产出仍有价值——写入l3_findings供未来引用，但不在用户刚完成时推送建议(易被视为事后诸葛亮)
跨session状态追踪需精确——git log + PROGRESS.md时间戳双向验证用户活动
case-012是引擎第11次自主激活——从未被用户质疑的OBSERVE行为模式已验证有效
